prices.source_block:
Public Performances
Students/Children: $25 Adults/Seniors: $35
Tickets available on each show’s page.

prices.source_phrase: All patrons age 62+ are eligible to receive $5 off select Greater Boston Stage Company mainstage and concert/event ticket purchases.
prices.source_block:
SENIOR DISCOUNT

All patrons age 62+ are eligible to receive $5 off select Greater Boston Stage Company mainstage and concert/event ticket purchases. Discount must be mentioned at time of purchase.

prices.source_phrase: Mainstage tickets for all children and students (including college and graduate school) are available for $26.
prices.source_block:
STUDENT TICKETS

Mainstage tickets for all children and students (including college and graduate school) are available for $26. Use code STUDENT when purchasing tickets or contact the box office at 781-279-2200.

prices.source_phrase: Mainstage tickets for all children and students (including college and graduate school) are available for $26.
prices.source_block:
STUDENT TICKETS

Mainstage tickets for all children and students (including college and graduate school) are available for $26. Use code STUDENT when purchasing tickets or contact the box office at 781-279-2200.

prices.source_phrase: All active duty, veteran or retired military personnel receive $5 off all Greater Boston Stage Company Mainstage ticket purchases.
prices.source_block:
MILITARY DISCOUNT

All active duty, veteran or retired military personnel receive $5 off all Greater Boston Stage Company Mainstage ticket purchases. Discount must be mentioned at time of purchase. An ID card or proof of service may be required.

prices.source_phrase: Non-member orders are assessed a $5.00 per ticket handling fee for phone orders and $5.00 per ticket online, which enables Greater Boston Stage Company to keep overall prices low and production values high.
prices.source_block: Non-member orders are assessed a $5.00 per ticket handling fee for phone orders and $5.00 per ticket online, which enables Greater Boston Stage Company to keep overall prices low and production values high. Fees are waived for walk-up customers at the Box Office. Subscribers are always offered the best seats available.

reservation.source_phrase: Tickets may be exchanged up to 24 hours prior to the performance for a different performance of the same production per order.
reservation.source_block: All sales are final and non-refundable. Ticket sales are not tax deductible. Discounts or special offers must be mentioned at time of purchase, and multiple discounts cannot be combined; proper ID and/or verification of discounts are required to redeem tickets. No retroactive discounts will be given. Schedules are subject to change. Tickets may be exchanged up to 24 hours prior to the performance for a different performance of the same production per order. Non-member orders are assessed a $5.00 per ticket handling fee for phone orders and $5.00 per ticket online, which enables Greater Boston Stage Company to keep overall prices low and production values high. Fees are waived for walk-up customers at the Box Office. Subscribers are always offered the best seats available.

hours.source_phrase: Hours: noon to 4pm, Tuesday through Friday
hours.source_block:
Box Office

Hours: noon to 4pm, Tuesday through Friday Phone number: 781-279-2200 Email: boxoffice@greaterbostonstage.org
